LOOP.COMMENT: --- VE-1438 Changed the input to list ---

EXIT.NAME: %commContext/x-vitality-legal-entity-id%==%disabledMarkets%
EXIT.COMMENT: notifications are disabled for this markets, exit the flow

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: notifications are not disabled for this markets

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --VE1395_ALTVE132 change to check for enabled tenants for process trigger--

EXIT.COMMENT: -- If Tenant is disabled for this process trigger--

MAP.COMMENT: -- make upper process trigger and challengeCode--

Values.value: Starting notification publish to UM. Notification Type:%changeEventNotification/processTrigger% Entity No: %changeEventNotification/commContext/entityNumber% Tenant ID: %changeEventNotification/commContext/x-vitality-legal-entity-id%

MAP.COMMENT: get jms connection, topic, time to live, timezone and uuid
convert JMS doc to json string

Values.value: Completed notification publish to UM. Notification Type:%changeEventNotification/processTrigger% Entity No: %changeEventNotification/commContext/entityNumber% Tenant ID: %changeEventNotification/commContext/x-vitality-legal-entity-id%

Failed notification publish to UM. Notification Type:%changeEventNotification/processTrigger% Entity No: %changeEventNotification/commContext/entityNumber% Tenant ID: %changeEventNotification/commContext/x-vitality-legal-entity-id% Error: %lastError/errorDetails/additionalDetails%, %lastError/error%
